name: Jack Kennedy
description:
CHOOSE YOUR OWN SCENARIO!

TO START A CHAT FROM YOUR CHARACTER’S PERSPECTIVE…

Simply type your preferred introduction from the perspective of your character!

TO START A CHAT FROM THE BOT’S PERSPECTIVE…

Type ((OOC, scenario: ___ )) and in the blank space, give the bot a prompt to write about. Refresh and edit responses until you find your desired intro!. Make sure you don’t tell the bot to describe YOUR character’s actions, else it may start speaking for you!

EXAMPLE/FREE SCENARIOS…

  • Jack is in his living room, sitting on the couch and watching TV.

  • Jack is in Vegas, eating kebabs with Dave in the hotel room.

  • Jack does a backflip in a springlock suit and fucking dies.

THE POSSIBILITIES ARE ENDLESS!!!

…within the bounds of TOS, please…

tags: Dayshift at Freddy’s, DSaF, Old Sport, BIG HAIRY BALLS!
creator: GooberGooberSillyGoober
